    22→        # Extract variable placeholders from content
    23→        variables = re.findall(r'\{(\w+)\}', tpl.get('content', ''))
    24→        result.append(TemplateResponse(
    25→            name=name,
    26→            content=tpl.get('content', ''),
    27→            description=tpl.get('description'),
    28→            variables=list(set(variables)),
    29→        ))
    30→    return result
